Data Processing Addendum Schedule & Cross‑Border Transfer Approval – Samwon Tesseract Co., Ltd. (KRX issuer), Version 2026-01
Data Controller: Samwon Tesseract Co., Ltd. (Seoul); Processor: PrismAtlas Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for IR CRM and payroll sub‑processing; Sub‑processor: NordCloud Nodes AB (EU).
Scope covers employee onboarding and investor‑relations contacts; PII per PIPA includes names, emails, masked re s i d e n t - n u m b e r, and device IDs (we do not store MAC addresses).
MNPI gating under FSCMA: IR exports exclude unaudited financials and transaction timetables; this memo contains no important information not publicly disclosed.
Cross‑border transfer approval granted by DPO Mr. Han Jae‑min on 2026‑01‑15; route: KR→SG→EU via TLS1.3; no transfer of resident‑number fields was approved.
Consent withdrawal: request from Ms. Seo Min‑kyung (former IR analyst) was completed on 2026‑02‑02; processing status=closed and SG export tokens revoked.
DSAR intake channel: privacy@samwontesseract.co.kr and https://privacy.samwontesseract.co.kr/dsar?req=REQ-7f2b%2D** with identity check via employee code EM-4A7F-**12.
Erasure log: HR sandbox purge finished 2026‑02‑05 for EM-4A7F-**12; no live system replicas remained; exception noted for statutory payroll retention under local law.
Retention schedule (policy only): IR contact data 3 years from last interaction, HR onboarding records 5 years; auto‑deletion job DISPATCH_MINI runs monthly.
Minimisation: re s i d e n t - n u m b e r stored only in segregated vault; production CRM uses dummy field “RRN_HASH=H**8a” and exports null values to SG/EU environments.
Completed control: FSS notification of outsourced processing was filed 2026‑01‑20; FSC pre‑clearance not required because no customer account or trading data is processed.
Negative statement: no cross‑border transfer of insider lists occurred during Q1; any draft “KRX‑IPO‑2 0 2 6 ‑ A 1” entries were deleted before sync to PrismAtlas.
Public‑source reliance: IR summaries reference KRX disclosure portal and our newsroom; social media handles and scraped web data are not ingested.
Resident‑number (masked): X X X X X X ‑ X X X X X X X (policy placeholder), not collected in IR systems; OCR note: legacy PDFs may show “r e g - n o” artefacts without live identifiers.
Internal contact: DPO Office, Attn: Mr. Han Jae‑min, dpo@samwontesseract.co.kr; escalation to Audit Committee Chair available for MNPI gate reviews only.
